user.title: House Voice Manager
user.description:
Add House Voice Manager to Home Assistant.

Click **Submit** to install.

abort.already_configured: House Voice Manager is already installed.

ultra_tts_missing.title: script.ultra_tts is not available
ultra_tts_missing.description: House Voice Manager failed to call `script.ultra_tts`. Make sure the script exists and is correctly configured in Home Assistant. Voice events cannot be spoken until this is resolved.

event_not_found.message: House Voice event '{event_id}' was not found. Make sure the event exists in the House Voice panel.

no_speakers.message: House Voice event '{event_id}' has no speakers configured. Add at least one speaker in the House Voice panel.

ultra_tts_failed.message: House Voice failed to call script.ultra_tts for event '{event_id}'. Check that the script exists and is working correctly.

say.name: Say voice event
say.description: Speak a stored voice event by ID.

event.name: Event ID
event.description: The ID of the voice event to speak.

add_event.name: Add voice event
add_event.description: Add or update a voice event in storage.

event.name: Event ID
event.description: Unique identifier for this voice event.

message.name: Message
message.description: The TTS message text. Supports Jinja2 templates.

speakers.name: Speakers
speakers.description: One or more media_player entity IDs to speak on.

priority.name: Priority
priority.description: Priority level: info, normal or critical.

delete_event.name: Delete voice event
delete_event.description: Delete a voice event from storage.

event.name: Event ID
event.description: The ID of the voice event to delete.

test_event.name: Test voice event
test_event.description: Test-speak a stored voice event immediately.

event.name: Event ID
event.description: The ID of the voice event to test.
